nodes.label: P2.1 synth — depth-slope headline (2/9 learning cells PASS)
nodes.rationale: layer+lin (HERO) is the only clearly positive bar (+0.0029/layer); len+sq (WALL) sits at ~+0.0001 (essentially flat); the other 7 cells (batchBN+lin, group+lin, onlineBN+lin, batchBN+sq, layer+sq, none+lin, len+lin) are all negative. The synth counterpart to the cifar 0/7 GATE-FAILED chart, showing headroom does exist off-CIFAR.
